Summary
DescriptionAutódromo Internacional Ayrton Senna (Goiânia) track map (Brazil)--Mixed circuit.svg
English: Track map for use with Autódromo Internacional Ayrton Senna. Shows the "Mixed Circuit".
Date
4 August 2010
Source
Own work
Author
Will Pittenger
Other versions
“External circuit”
“Short circuit”
